title: Aristarchos #0708
definition:
Aristarchus = "the best ruler"

 1) a certain Christian of Thessalonica, and accompanied Paul on his
    third missionary journey
nasbUsage:
Definition: Aristarchus = "the best ruler"

 1) a certain Christian of Thessalonica, and accompanied Paul on his
    third missionary journey

    NASB:  best leader, Aristarchus, a Chr. of Thessalonica:
